channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Fruita dominates Liberty in Round 1 of 6A playoffs, as Jhett Wells explodes for 36 points
item.description: What we witnessed at Fruita Monument High School Friday night was nothing short of a Wildcat masterclass.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: 76ers shut down Joel Embiid for rest of NBA season due to nagging knee injury
item.description: The Philadelphia 76ers said it was determined that the 2023 NBA MVP was "medically unable to play." The team had attempted manage the pain in the center's knee.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: JuJu Watkins and No. 4 USC visit No. 2 UCLA in winner-take-all game for Big Ten regular-season title
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — It’s probably not what the Big Ten expected when the league opened its doors to UCLA and USC this season: two West Coast schools dominating the women’s basketball standings.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: USA Swimming says Delaware AD Chrissi Rawak will not assume role as CEO and president
item.description: USA Swimming’s board of governors said Friday night that Delaware athletic director Chrissi Rawak will not assume the role as CEO and president because of “unforeseen personal circumstances that we learned about late this week.”.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Dodgers star Shohei Ohtani hits HR in 1st spring at-bat following offseason shoulder surgery
item.description: Los Angeles Dodgers slugger Shohei Ohtani hit a solo home run in his first spring training plate appearance following offseason shoulder surgery.
item.dc:creator: David Brandt, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: San Diego FC home opener: Where to watch outside Snapdragon Stadium
item.description: After a stunning win against the Los Angeles Galaxy in its Major League Soccer debut, San Diego FC is set to make its first-ever appearance on the club's home turf on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Real Salt Lake seeks redemption in MLS home opener against Seattle Sounders
item.description: After a humbling early exit in the CONCACAF Champions Cup at the hands of Herediano, Real Salt Lake looks to hit the reset button ahead of their 2025 MLS regular season opener against the Seattle Sounders.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, Royal Riot Pod, ABC 4

item.title: Yankees legend Bernie Williams using his music to help those affected by disease that took his father's life
item.description: Bernie Williams is known for his years with the New York Yankees, but music has been his main passion since leaving the game. He now uses that platform to honor his father's legacy.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Timberwolves star Anthony Edwards suspended 1 game by NBA after picking up 16th technical foul
item.description: Minnesota Timberwolves star Anthony Edwards has been suspended one game without pay by the NBA after picking up his 16th technical foul of the season during the third quarter against the Los Angeles Lakers.
item.dc:creator: Joe Reedy, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Utah wins third straight, dominating Minnesota, 6-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Clayton Keller tallied a career-high five points (one goal, four assists) and the Utah Hockey Club defeated the Minnesota Wild 6-1 at Delta Center on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Southern California, UCLA, Texas and Notre Dame are projected top seeds in women's NCAA Tournament
item.description: JuJu Watkins and Southern California have moved up to a No. 1 seed in the women's NCAA Tournament in the latest projections of the top teams.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 15 Michigan beats Rutgers 84-82 on Burnett's 3-pointer at buzzer, moves into 1st-place tie
item.description: ANN ARBOR, Mich. (AP) — Nimari Burnett made a long 3-pointer at the buzzer, lifting No. 15 Michigan to an 84-82 win over Rutgers on Thursday night and into a first-place tie in the Big Ten with rival Michigan State. The Wolverines (22-6, 14-3 Big Ten) rallied after trailing by 12 in the second half.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Stephen Curry scores 56 points and makes 12 3-pointers in Warriors' 121-115 win over Magic
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — Stephen Curry scored a season-high 56 points, making 12 3-pointers and outscoring Orlando by himself in the third quarter of another astounding performance, leading the Golden State Warriors to a 121-115 victory over the Magic on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: DICK SCANLON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lone Peak wins fourth straight state championship
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The dynasty continues for the Lone Peak girls basketball team. The Knights won their fourth straight state championship Thursday beating Copper Hills for a second straight year, 46-42.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: No. 5 UConn claims 5th straight Big East regular-season title with 72-53 win over No. 22 Creighton
item.description: HARTFORD, Conn. (AP) — Sarah Strong had 22 points and nine rebounds and Paige Bueckers added 15 points, seven rebounds and seven assists as No. 5 UConn defeated No. 22 Creighton 72-53 on Thursday night and claimed its fifth straight Big East regular-season title.
item.dc:creator: JIM FULLER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bears prospects to watch at the NFL Scouting Combine: Defensive linemen and linebackers
item.description: The NFL Scouting Combine is showcasing top defensive line and linebacker prospects, including James Pearce Jr., Mykel Williams, Mike Green, Shemar Stewart, Jack Sawyer, Donovan Ezeiruaku, Landon Jackson, Princely Umanmielen, Mason Graham, and Kenneth Grant.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: BYU drains 17 three-pointers in 91-81 win over ASU
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (ABC4 Sports) - Richie Saunders scored 26 points, Trevin Knell added 18 and No. 25 BYU beat short-handed Arizona State 91-81 on Wednesday night to extend its winning streak to five games.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jazz late comeback falls short against Portland
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Anfernee Simons had 28 points and out six assists to lead the Portland Trail Blazers to a 114-112 victory over the Utah Jazz on Monday night. Keyonte George, who scored 21 points, missed a 25-foot three-pointer at the buzzer that would have won the game.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
